data.title: Bitcoin Slips Back To $70,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Dump On ETF Outflows
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to around $70,000 due to institutional outflows halting the relief rally. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $227.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $90.9 million. Current cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin - $70,389.76, Ethereum - $2,056.73, Solana - $87.56, XRP - $1.39, Dogecoin - $0.09323, Shiba Inu - $0.0005534. The meme coin sector as a whole declined by approximately 3% to reach about $32. This information is further detailed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GreenArrow Announces Acquisition of The Narwhal Group to Accelerate Innovation in Intelligent Transportation Systems
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Salt Lake City, GreenArrow Holdings, Inc. revealed its acquisition of The Narwhal Group, a prominent provider of transportation products. This move strengthens GreenArrow's position in the advanced transportation infrastructure market. The transaction marks a significant milestone for both companies, consolidating their expertise and market influence.

data.title: Kura Oncology Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 2, 2026, Kura Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: KURA) in San Diego announced that the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors granted nonstatutory stock options to purchase 44,700 shares of common stock to four new employees. This grant was made under the Company’s 2023 Inducement Option Plan, as amended. The stock options were approved as inducement awards essential to these employees’ employment, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: TG Therapeutics Announces Schedule of Data Presentations for BRIUMVI® (ublituximab) in Multiple Sclerosis at the American Academy of Neurology 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: TG Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TGTX) recently revealed their plans for presentations on BRIUMVI® (ublituximab-xiiy) data for patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS) at the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) 2026 annual meeting in Chicago, Illinois, scheduled from April 18 to 22, 2026. The abstracts for these presentations are now accessible on the AAN meeting website at https://www.aan.com/events/annual-meeting-abstracts. Stay updated for further details on the upcoming talks.

data.title: Embraer Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: Embraer (NYSE: EMBJ) unveiled its Q4 earnings on Friday, March 6, 2026, at 06:57 AM. The earnings report showcased notable figures. Embraer exceeded estimated earnings by a significant margin of 394.12%, with an EPS of $0.84 compared to the anticipated $0.17. Revenue witnessed a $340.00 million upturn from the corresponding period the previous year. For further insights on the company's past earnings performance, details can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.description: TROY, Mich. - On March 06, 2026, Kelly, a prominent global talent solutions provider (Nasdaq: KELYA, KELYB), revealed its participation in forthcoming investor conferences.

data.title: Consolidated Lithium Metals Provides Update on Kwyjibo Rare Earth Project
data.description: On March 06, 2026, Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc. (TSXV: CLM | FRA: Z36 | OTCQB: JORFF) announced an acquisition deal to potentially obtain an 80% stake in the Kwyjibo Rare Earth Project. The project is situated 125 km northeast of Sept-Îles, in the Côte-Nord region of Québec. This acquisition is contingent upon meeting specific criteria outlined in the agreement.

data.title: Quantum Leap Energy Enters into Memorandum of Understanding with a Large U.S. Energy Company Regarding Evaluation of Support to Advance Domestic Enriched Uranium Fuel Supply Chain
data.description: Represents a significant advancement in bolstering the U.S. supply chain for nuclear fuel.
